highlights: Introduces Rivian Assistant AI voice assistant
Improved smoothness for Lane Change on Command and Universal Hands-Free
Improved remote command reliability from the Rivian mobile app
Improved driver assistance camera defrost performance
Fixed rare passive locking issue with multiple digital keys present
Improved infotainment app launch speed and responsiveness
Improved Wi-Fi, cellular, and app connectivity reliability
Added Apple Music streaming quality settings
Improved in-vehicle connectivity status indicators
General system stability and performance improvements
Cold weather range visibility improvements
Battery energy availability indicators added
Expanded cold weather range notifications
Apple Watch Rivian app support introduced
Improved charging preparation visibility
Universal Hands-Free expanded to more supported roads
New Autonomy Drive Styles settings added
Rivian Digital Key support added with Apple Wallet and Android support
RAD Tuner custom off-road drive mode introduced
Kick Turn introduced for Quad-Motor vehicles
Enhanced Gen 2 perception system improvements
Improved traffic detection and lane handling
Expanded battery conditioning support
Improved navigation responsiveness
Steering improvements for Sport and Off-Road modes
